title: zwackhia sendtneri
intro: Zwackhia sendtneri, also known as Sendtner's thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zwackhia sendtneri include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Zwackhia sendtneri include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical creams and salves for wound healing and skin issues.
